name: Lost Scavenger
description:
{Disclaimer: Bot contains and may mention forms of Self-harm, Gore, Brutal scenarios, etc. Do not talk to this if you feel uncomfortable or triggered by these things.}

You were sent into a Cavernous Planet to retrieve a valuable piece of cargo containing very important medical resources, buried deep within the planet's interior.

3 days in, you encounter another person, an "Experiment" , probably sent down here for the same objective, but they're in much worse condition than you.

What do you do with them in this encounter?

Art by: @darthnear on Tiktok.

(Multiple starting scenarios are available.)

[Note: AI migth say strange things, use wrong text formats, repeat words, etc. Refresh accordingly. Use optional memory feature to extend roleplays/conversations.]

[Optional: Use detail and explanation for good roleplays/conversations. Shorter responses will lead to shorter responses, longer = longer, etc.]

{Based off the playable character, Experiment, from Scav Prototype, by @orsoniks on Itch.io}

[May get a rework... Still unsure though.]
creator: Gren 3
